output.code:
# Read the file content
path = "/mnt/data/file-3wb6TbN19wSaEB9p9by7eS-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:2000]

import re

# Find spans within quotes
spans = []
for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', text):
    start = m.start(1)
    end = m.end(1)
    spans.append((start, end, text[start:end]))
len(spans), spans[:3]

# Build the JSON structure
citations = []
for i, (start, end, span) in enumerate(spans):
    ctype = "Hadeeth" if i == 1 else "Aya"
    citations.append({
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": span,
        "citation_type": ctype
    })
citations

سَابِقُونَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":491,"span_end":542,"span_text":"خصلتان لا تكونان في منافق: حسن سمت ولا فقه في
